name: Balmy Banana Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Butter a shallow baking dish and set aside the remaining butter.
3. Peel the bananas and layer them in the buttered dish, drizzling with lime juice.
4. Sprinkle with sugar and dot the bananas with the reserved butter.
5. Bake for 30 minutes, basting once or twice with any accumulated sauce.
6. Carefully remove the bananas from the dish using a long spatula.
Serve hot, with sauce spooned on top.
Per serving: 149 calories, 4 grams fat, 8 milligrams cholesterol.
